Authenticated REST API users can read any file on the server with "cmd=log" command and a log path crafted in a certain way.
This issue affects Apache Ignite: from 2.0.0 through 2.17.0.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.18.0, which fixes the issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00526, "percentile": 0.40541}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v45h-mqf4-6939", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T22:08:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v45h-mqf4-6939", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v45h-mqf4-6939"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-48977"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-28T10:16:23Z", "published_at": "2026-05-28T12:30:28Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-48977", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/hgct6918sowd8l58yjohryhpxx81t4n1", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/28/3", "https://github.com/apache/ignite/commit/5c42c7a303937844179ad470edb35c1ad1cee6ab", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v45h-mqf4-6939"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/ignite", "summary": "Apache Ignite REST API Has a Relative Path Traversal Vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T22:08:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-v45h-mqf4-6939", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.18.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.ignite:ignite-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0, < 2.18.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
